name: ax-setup
description: Unified entry point for AX measurement on Claude Code. The 'setup-ax' skill asks one question — is this PC a client (sends transcripts), the server (receives them), or both (local testing) — then guides installing the right plugin(s) and runs their install skills in the correct order (server first, then client pointed at it). A thin orchestrator: it bundles no runtime and duplicates no logic — it delegates to install-ax-monitor / install-ax-server.
